M-008.NAME: tasks
M-008.owns: scheduler and recurring maintenance jobs including subscription expiry, daily cleanup, configurable anti-abuse handshake scans, and MTProto policy reconciliation

exports.fn-detect-handshake-anomalies: Configurable seconds-based job that delegates live peer observations to M-023/M-031
exports.task-mtproto-policy-sync: Fixed-interval job that delegates MTProto policy reconciliation to M-044
